basic_details.job_title: Allahabad University Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Allahabad University Project Technical Support III Notification 2026 has been released on 14 May 2026 on the official website Allahabad University Official Website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government of India/ICMR rules.

qualification.details: Project Technical Support-III: Three years graduate degree in Zoology/Agricultural Entomology/Allied subjects + Three years post qualification (work) experience OR M.Sc. Zoology/ Agricultural Entomology/Allied subjects. Desirable: Excellent academic record with first class in graduate and postgraduate examinations. Candidates with hands-on training, experience and knowledge in insect rearing and hemolymph collection, protein isolation and purification, biochemical and enzymatic assays, SDS-PAGE and related protein characterization techniques, molecular biology techniques such as RNA isolation, cDNA synthesis, PCR, gene cloning, recombinant protein expression, microbial culture techniques and in vitro and in vivo experimental studies, will be preferred. Additional preference will be given to candidates qualified GATE /NET (Life Sciences).

salary_details.details: Rs. 28000/- per month + HRA 20% for the first two years. An increment of 5% on the initial emoluments after completing two years, subject to satisfactory performance review.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Allahabad University Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Allahabad University Project Technical Support-III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Allahabad University Project Technical Support-III recruitment is 16th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Technical Support-III post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a three years graduate degree in Zoology/Agricultural Entomology/Allied subjects with three years of post-qualification experience, or an M.Sc. in Zoology/Agricultural Entomology/Allied subjects.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Technical Support-III position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Technical Support-III post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India/ICMR rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support-III post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 28,000 per month plus 20% HRA for the first two years. An increment of 5% is applicable after two years based on performance.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technical Support-III post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Technical Support-III post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Allahabad University Project Technical Support-III recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Allahabad University located?
faq.answer: Allahabad University is located in Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 211002.

faq.question: Q10. What are the desirable qualifications for the Project Technical Support-III post?
faq.answer: Desirable qualifications include an excellent academic record, hands-on experience in insect rearing, protein isolation, biochemical assays, molecular biology techniques, and microbial culture. Preference is also given to candidates qualified in GATE/NET (Life Sciences).
